definitions.text: Not any of a given number or group.
examples: None of those is a good example. None are even acceptable.
None of this meat tastes right.
None of those people is my father.
None of those people are my parents. None shall pass.

definitions.text: Not any; no (usually used only before a vowel or h):
examples: Thou shalt have none other gods but me.

definitions.text: To no extent, in no way.
examples: I felt none the worse for my recent illness.
He was none too pleased with the delays in the program that was supposed to be his legacy.
We could hear none too well from the back.

definitions.text: Alternative form of nones: the ninth hour after dawn; the religious service appointed to this hour.
Synonym of midafternoon: the time around or following noon or nones.
